name: Salesforce
notes: Free Developer Edition org lets you self-mint OAuth2 connected-app creds; REST/SOAP/GraphQL APIs plus first-party hosted MCP server (GA), so easy to build against.

name: DealCloud
notes: Enterprise Intapp product with no free tier; API key/clientId->OAuth token only obtainable by admin users inside a paying customer org (via CSM), so not self-obtainable.

name: Zendesk
notes: Free trial account lets you mint API tokens/OAuth clients yourself against the REST API; official MCP server is only EAP (summer 2026), community servers exist.

name: Gladly
notes: Token-based Basic auth over REST, but tokens require the API User permission granted by an admin inside a paying Gladly org; no free developer signup, so not self-obtainable.

name: Slack
notes: Free workspace lets you create an app and self-mint OAuth2 bot/user tokens for the REST Web API; first-party MCP server (mcp.slack.com) GA, so easy to build against.
